subtopics.title: Meaning and Types of Government
common_misconceptions: Democracy means everyone does what they want
Military government is better because there's order
subtopics.teaching_note: Government: organization that makes and enforces laws for a country. Democracy: government by the people (through elected representatives). Monarchy: ruled by king/queen. Military: ruled by armed forces. Nigeria: federal presidential democracy. Three branches: Executive (President), Legislature (National Assembly), Judiciary (courts). Constitution: supreme law. Federal system: power shared between federal and state governments.
